steps.title: Identify what evidence would support the team's claim
steps.content:
The team claims migrating whales don't live only on stored energy.
To directly support this, we need evidence that whales obtain energy during the migration itself.
The crucial signal: observations showing whales feeding while migrating.

steps.title: Match to evidence of feeding during migration
steps.content:
The correct answer provides observations of whales feeding as they migrate to breeding grounds; this proves whales gain energy en route, directly supporting the team's claim.

The other choices address different topics (marine life coexistence, observation frequency, timing patterns) that don't establish feeding during migration.

This is the correct answer.
